---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case this feature would unblock.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.

## Security and privacy impact

This is an end-to-end encrypted, self-hosted messenger. If the feature
touches message content, key material, metadata, or would require the server
to see something it currently cannot, please say so — it doesn't rule the
idea out, but it needs to be part of the discussion.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — links, screenshots, prior art in other messengers.
